TextView.value: Handlers can use items stored in backpacks named "fannypack".
These backpacks contain usable items such as health kits, nano kits, attack items, or any other handler-usable items.
These backpacks can not be empty
/rebuff – Removes buffs the player currently has (does not remove outside buffs)
/rebuff all – Removes all buffs
/handlerchannel – Shows or sets the IPC channel.
The only reason to change this is to separate
your box into different groups.
It is a local setting ONLY!
/petstats – Shows relevant pet stats
/HandlerSettings – Opens the folder where player settings are saved
/updatesettings – Updates spells, items and perks
/HandlerEnable – Stops and starts the handler base (toggles spell, item and perk auto-usage)
/resetui – Resets all window positions and sizes to their default values
Reserve NCU – Stops alts from buffing you when your available NCU reaches the reserve amount.
Wait for mp nano comps - Wait for Metaphysicist Composite Nano Skills
Wait for Wrangle - Wait for Trader Team Wrangle
If a window has a Save button, it saves the settings when clicked.
If a window does not have a Save button, settings are saved when the window is closed.
You must reinject when a new perk, item, or spell is added.
These are only registered when the plugin is injected.
For help or to report issues, send a tell and include what you need help with or a brief description of the issue.
/tell serverrack !join
